title: Google DeepMind pilots Gemini-powered support for Indian robotics educators
friendlyTitle: Google pilots an AI helper for Indian robotics teachers
summary: Google DeepMind and India’s Atal Innovation Mission have launched an initial 100-school pilot of ATL Saathi. The Gemini-powered tool helps robotics-lab educators navigate training material, generate curriculum-aligned projects and create step-by-step experiments in multiple languages.
friendlySummary: A new Gemini tool helps teachers in Indian robotics labs find learning materials, plan projects and explain experiments in several languages.
whyItMatters: The pilot is a concrete test of AI as a teacher-side assistant: it aims to lower preparation and translation overhead while preserving hands-on, locally grounded learning.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It could give teachers more support and help students spend more time building and learning.
